from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass
class UserProfile:
    name: str
    email: str
    age: int
    is_active: bool


def get_user_profile(user_id: int) -> UserProfile:
    user = fetch_user(user_id)
    return UserProfile(
        name=user.name,
        email=user.email,
        age=user.age,
        is_active=user.is_active,
    )


def process_order(order_id: int):
    profile = get_user_profile(order_id)
    if not profile.is_active:
        return
    send_email(profile.email, profile.name)


@dataclass
class LatencyMetrics:
    p50: float
    p95: float
    p99: float
    throughput: float
    error_rate: float


def fetch_metrics() -> LatencyMetrics:
    return LatencyMetrics(
        p50=0.95, p95=120.5, p99=45.2, throughput=300, error_rate=0.02
    )


def analyze_performance():
    metrics = fetch_metrics()
    if metrics.error_rate > 0.01:
        alert(f"High error rate: {metrics.error_rate}")
    report_latency(metrics.p50, metrics.p95, metrics.p99)
